text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... So everyone loves delicious food, yes?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... how do you feel about a sweet treat?
Like whipped cream with strawberries and
peaches on top?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Creek, she said it doesn't sound bad. That means
we're in the clear for a birthday cake!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's good news. I already have the
ingredients, so I can make it right away. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Great, we'll knock it out of the park! Just you
wait, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Are ya tryin' to sneakily tease out what I want or
not?!
